name: ChartMogul
description: SaaS subscription analytics platform. Track MRR, ARR, churn, LTV, and other key metrics. Manage customers, plans, invoices, and subscriptions.

capabilities.name: account_retrieve
capabilities.description: Retrieve account details including name, currency, and timezone.

capabilities.name: data_sources_create
capabilities.description: Create a new data source for importing billing data.

capabilities.name: data_sources_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all data sources.

capabilities.name: data_sources_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a data source and all associated data.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a customer in ChartMogul under a specified data source.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all customers.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific customer by UUID.

capabilities.name: customers_update
capabilities.description: Update customer attributes like name, email, company, or location.

capabilities.name: customers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a customer and all associated data.

capabilities.name: plans_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subscription plan.

capabilities.name: plans_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all plans.

capabilities.name: invoices_create
capabilities.description: Import invoices into ChartMogul for a customer.

capabilities.name: invoices_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of invoices with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_list
capabilities.description: List all subscriptions for a customer.

capabilities.name: metrics_mrr
capabilities.description: Retrieve Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR) metrics for a date range.

capabilities.name: metrics_arr
capabilities.description: Retrieve Annualized Run Rate (ARR) metrics for a date range.

capabilities.name: metrics_arpa
capabilities.description: Retrieve Average Revenue Per Account (ARPA) metrics.

capabilities.name: metrics_asp
capabilities.description: Retrieve Average Sale Price (ASP) metrics.

capabilities.name: metrics_customer_count
capabilities.description: Retrieve customer count metrics over time.

capabilities.name: metrics_churn_rate
capabilities.description: Retrieve customer churn rate metrics.

capabilities.name: metrics_mrr_churn_rate
capabilities.description: Retrieve MRR churn rate metrics.

capabilities.name: metrics_ltv
capabilities.description: Retrieve Customer Lifetime Value (LTV) metrics.

capabilities.name: metrics_all
capabilities.description: Retrieve all key SaaS metrics (MRR, ARR, ARPA, ASP, customer count, churn, LTV) in a single request.
